content: Our paper titled "A User Threat Driven Multi-Objective Adaptive VM Allocation Framework for Cloud Security" has been accepted to IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics & Security (TIFS), a CCF A and CAS Q1 TOP journal.
Our paper titled "Distilling Time Series Foundation Models for Efficient Forecasting" has been accepted to ICASSP 2026.
I have created and launched my academic homepage.
